name: Barry R.
quote: Best orthopedic surgeon in Havasu AZ. Easy to work with and explains options well. Thank you!!

name: Regina C.
quote: Dr. Barnes came to my rescue. He is kind, funny, knowledgeable, and informative. 10/10 recommended Dr. Barnes!!!

name: Raymond A.
quote: Professional and personal service.

name: Michael B.
quote: He takes the time to explain everything.

name: Roxana H.
quote: Very patient friendly, also his office staff is friendly and considering. Scott is an amazing assistant.

name: Raymond A.
quote: Professional service. Dr. Barnes took time to explain all my options. Would definitely recommend him to everyone seeking help.

name: Joseph M.
quote: Excellent doctor, takes the time needed to answer all of my questions and explain everything in a way that is easy to understand. Dr. Barnes is highly recommended!!

name: Paula D.
quote: The office staff is excellent. Scott is great. Dr. Barnes is kind, professional, very competent, and listens intently. He offers treatment solutions to my needs.

name: Patricia G.
quote: One of the best doctors I’ve ever seen. He’s knowledgeable, informative and recommends the treatment you’re most comfortable with.

name: Peter D.
quote: Outstanding care. Dr. Barnes is caring and competent. I trust him for all my care and treatment.

name: Jon M.
quote: Great Dr. and super friendly!

name: Alice D.
quote: Staff is very knowledgeable and Dr. Barnes is caring.

name: Patient review
quote: Dr. Barnes is awesome. He explained everything every step of the way, including the process and what to expect.

name: Patient review
quote: GREAT Dr. Diagnosed me after hearing my history and sent me for tests and a plan of action for pain relief in my knee.

name: Patient review
quote: Dr. Barnes treated me for trigger finger and a cyst in the right hand. I experienced no pain during or after surgery and felt I was in good hands.

name: Patient review
quote: Just had surgery to repair a torn meniscus on my right knee. Dr. Barnes explained all options and procedure thoroughly. Great bedside manner and great doctor.

name: Awesome!
quote: Dr. Barnes is awesome. Very knowledgeable and patient friendly. I highly recommend Dr. Barnes. We need more doctors like Dr. Barnes!

name: Kevin W.
quote: From start to finish, he exemplified the highest standards of medical excellence. Dr. Barnes is, without a doubt, the best of the best.

name: Jackie A.
quote: He attended to a broken arm and tibia hardware removal. I really like his attitude and knowledge. Good sense of humor too!

name: Jan P.
quote: So glad to have him here and to be my doctor. He is friendly, thoroughly explains options and procedures, and has a great bedside manner.

name: Rayleen S.
quote: Dr. Barnes is very thorough, professional, efficient and caring. I am very picky about what medical professionals I will trust with my care.
